ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization problem */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization problem (e.g., single-objective, multi-objective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization problem */,
  "problem_category" TEXT /* Category of the optimization problem (e.g., linear, nonlinear) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who created the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who last updated the problem */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective function */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective function */,
  "objective_function" TEXT /* Mathematical representation of the objective function */,
  "objective_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the objective function */,
  "objective_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the objective function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES optimization_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., constraint, objective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES optimization_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the objective function */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rule applied */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value obtained */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization process (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Message describing the optimization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES optimization_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization algorithm */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the optimization algorithm (e.g., population-based, stochastic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm result */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization algorithm */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value obtained */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization process (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Message describing the optimization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES optimization_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., simulation, real-world) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_objectives" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the objective function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_rules" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization problem */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second researcher */,
  "collaboration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
